initial_prompt: Network configuration with IPv4 and IPv6 addresses. Example: Router R1 has the IP 192.168.1.1/24. The server uses 10.0.0.5/32. Default route: 0.0.0.0/0. IPv6: 2002:CAFE:ABC::1/64. Use a slash for CIDR. The transcript covers network engineering, configurations for equipment such as Cisco, Mikrotik, Linux, etc., topologies, IPs, devices, or regions named with 1 to 3 letters plus 1 to 4 digits.
